code_changes.summary: CONNECT tunnel parser now accepts any complete three-digit 2xx response as success instead of accepting only 200.
Unit test now covers complete 200, 201, and 204 success responses while preserving malformed, incomplete, 407, and 500 failure expectations.

red_green.command: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" CARGO_NET_GIT_FETCH_WITH_CLI=true GIT_CONFIG_COUNT=1 GIT_CONFIG_KEY_0='url.https://github.com/openharmony/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime.git.insteadOf' GIT_CONFIG_VALUE_0='https://gitee.com/openharmony/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime.git' cargo test -p ylong_http_client --lib --no-default-features --features async,http1_1,tokio_base ut_tunnel_request_and_response -- --nocapture
red_green.result: failed before parser patch with assertion failure for HTTP/1.1 201 Created expected Complete
notes: Default-feature test run compiled no util tests because ylong_http_client default features are empty.
sync,http1_1 and sync,http1_1,tokio_base are not valid minimal compile combinations in this workspace; async,http1_1,tokio_base was used to compile the shared util::proxy tests.

red_green.command: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" CARGO_NET_GIT_FETCH_WITH_CLI=true GIT_CONFIG_COUNT=1 GIT_CONFIG_KEY_0='url.https://github.com/openharmony/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime.git.insteadOf' GIT_CONFIG_VALUE_0='https://gitee.com/openharmony/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime.git' cargo test -p ylong_http_client --lib --no-default-features --features async,http1_1,tokio_base ut_tunnel_request_and_response -- --nocapture

PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" CARGO_NET_GIT_FETCH_WITH_CLI=true GIT_CONFIG_COUNT=1 GIT_CONFIG_KEY_0='url.https://github.com/openharmony/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime.git.insteadOf' GIT_CONFIG_VALUE_0='https://gitee.com/openharmony/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime.git' cargo test -p ylong_http_client --lib --no-default-features --features async,http1_1,tokio_base tunnel -- --nocapture

environment_notes: The interactive PATH did not include $HOME/.cargo/bin, so verification commands explicitly prepend it.

Direct cargo/libgit2 fetch from gitee timed out. The local command uses CARGO_NET_GIT_FETCH_WITH_CLI and a per-command Git URL rewrite to the reachable GitHub mirror; no repository or global git config was changed.
preserved_fail_closed_cases: HTTP/1.1 2000 is still rejected as malformed status syntax.
HTTP/1.1 200 without a separating space is still rejected.
2xx success is still incomplete until the full header terminator is present.
remaining_related_work: Endpoint-level HTTPS proxy tests still need to prove the parser behavior through actual CONNECT tunnel setup.
TLS/mTLS positive and negative proxy endpoint tests are tracked by S3 and S5.
